hero.title: Your Journey Starts Here
hero.subtitle: Helping students turn their international education dreams into reality.
hero.quote: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dream.

story.alt: Masomo Now counselor presenting Northern Lights College's British Columbia campuses
story.title: Our Story
story.p1: Masomo Now is the Francophone Africa division of <1>ELIMU International Education Connections</1>, a Canadian education consultancy headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia.
story.p2: Our mission is to connect talented students with quality education opportunities around the world while providing trusted guidance throughout every step of the journey.

items.title: Licensed Immigration Support
items.description: Professional study permit and immigration guidance.

items.title: Canadian Registered Business
items.description: Operating through ELIMU International Education Connections.

offices.title: Our Office Locations
offices.subtitle: Serving students across East Africa, Europe, and North America.

items.title: Excellence
items.desc: Focused on successful admissions and visa outcomes.

seminars.title: Our Seminars
seminars.body: We regularly host school visits, education fairs, and community seminars across East Africa to help students and families explore international education opportunities.
items: Information session at a partner secondary school — walking students through the FMC pathway to Canada.
Students respond to a live poll during a school seminar on studying abroad.
International Education & Career Symposium — Nairobi, Kenya, in partnership with Northern Lights College.
Walking families through the route from British Columbia's Northern Lights College campuses to a study permit.
Our counselors follow up with students one-on-one after every seminar.
An ELIMU counselor presenting Northern Lights College's programs on stage in Nairobi.

team.title: Our Team
team.body: Our advisors work closely with licensed immigration professionals to provide personalized guidance from your first inquiry until you arrive at your destination.
items: Our Nairobi team preparing student resources for Thompson Rivers University.
ELIMU counselors at the International Education and Career Symposium in Nairobi.
ELIMU counselors presenting Canadian study pathways at the Nairobi symposium.
